titleStmt.title: SII 33.162: original edition by K. Munirathnam and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 162. (A.R. No. B 267 of 1950.) Turimella, Cumbum Taluk, Kurnool District.

summary.p: Broken slab near the Surabhēśvara temple.
This is dated Śaka 1164 [1242 A.D.], other details are damaged.

Fragmentary. Introduces Gaṇḍapeṇḍāra Gaṅgaya-Sāhiṇi who bears the epithet Arivīra-Brahmarākshasa and is said to have been ruling over Ēṟuva-Three-seventy division from the capital town of Krochcherula. The rest of the record is broken and lost.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti samasta praśasti sahitaṁ śrīmanma
hāmaṁḍalēśvaraṁ kākatipuravarādhī
śvaraṁ mūṟurāya jagadāḷa gaṇapati
dēva mahārājulu Ōrugallu nijarājadhā
nigā samasta mahivallabhuṁḍai sukhasaṁkadhā
vinōdaṁbuna rājyaṁbu sēyucuṁḍagā tattpāda
padmārādhakuṁḍaina śrīmadarivīra brahmarākṣasa gaṁ
ḍapeṁḍāra gaṁgaya sāhiṇi krocceṟulu nelavīḍugā
nēṟuvamūṁḍu ḍēbbaduluṁ duṣṭaniggrahaśiṣṭānugraha
ṁbuna brahmāttaraṁbugā sakala prajapālanaṁbusē
si sukhaṁbuṁḍi [sakava¨rṣa]ṁbulu 1164
The rest is broken and lost.
Digital edition of SII 33.162 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
